TENSION_POOL.Title: Tension Pool 2
TENSION_POOL.Settings.Position.Name: Window Position
TENSION_POOL.Settings.Position.Hint: Position the Tension Pool window relative to the macro hotbar.
TENSION_POOL.Settings.PoolSize.Name: Pool Size
TENSION_POOL.Settings.PoolSize.Hint: Maximum number of dice in the tension pool.
TENSION_POOL.Settings.IconTheme.Name: Icon Theme
TENSION_POOL.Settings.IconTheme.Hint: Choose the icon style for the tension pool.
TENSION_POOL.Settings.IconTheme.RefreshR: Icon theme changed. Please refresh your browser for the 3D dice to update.
TENSION_POOL.Settings.DiceSize.Name: Dice Size
TENSION_POOL.Settings.DiceSize.Hint: Type of dice to roll in the tension pool. Refresh required after changing.
TENSION_POOL.Settings.DiceSize.RefreshRe: Dice size changed. Please refresh your browser for the 3D dice to update.
Comma-separated names of macros to execute when a complication is rolled. Leave blank to disable.
TENSION_POOL.CustomRoll.Title: Custom Tension Roll
TENSION_POOL.CustomRoll.Label: Number of dice to roll (max 50)
TENSION_POOL.Settings.SoundEnabled.Name: Enable Sounds
TENSION_POOL.Settings.SoundEnabled.Hint: Play sound effects for tension pool events.
TENSION_POOL.Settings.AddDieSound.Name: Add Die Sound
TENSION_POOL.Settings.AddDieSound.Hint: Sound effect when a die is added to the pool. Use a file path or leave default.
TENSION_POOL.Settings.RemoveDieSound.Hin: Sound effect when a die is removed from the pool.
TENSION_POOL.Settings.RollSound.Name: Roll Sound
TENSION_POOL.Settings.RollSound.Hint: Sound effect when the tension pool is rolled.
